source_limitations: Intentionality, amount and time course, appetite, diet, gastrointestinal, endocrine, systemic and psychiatric symptoms, medicines, pregnancy, examination, measured trend, tests, diagnosis, and plan remain unsupported.
All retained legacy items remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction is authorised.
No authoritative source record is committed for this workflow; all legacy clinical content was removed.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
